questions.hindi: उसने जरूर बहुत मेहनत की होगी।
options: They must have spent a lot of money.
He must have worked very hard.
questions.answer: He must have worked very hard.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "उसने जरूर बहुत मेहनत की होगी।" = "He must have worked very hard."
Full sentence: "He must have been tired."

questions.sentence: They musts have made a mistake.
options: They musts have made a mistake.
They must have made a mistake.
questions.answer: They must have made a mistake.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "They must have made a mistake."

options: We must have chosen the right path.
She must have told the truth.
questions.answer: She must have told the truth.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "उसने जरूर सच बोला होगा।" = "She must have told the truth."
Full sentence: "We must have been late."

questions.sentence: He musts have read this book.
options: He musts have read this book.
He must have read this book.
questions.answer: He must have read this book.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "He must have read this book."

questions.hindi: वह जरूर बहुत खुश हुई होगी।
options: He must have talked to me.
He must have worked very hard.
They must have spent a lot of money.
She must have been very happy.
questions.answer: She must have been very happy.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "वह जरूर बहुत खुश हुई होगी।" = "She must have been very happy."

questions.sentence: They must have spent _____ lot of money.
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "They must have spent a lot of money."
Correct sentence: "He must have called me."

options: He must have thought a lot.
She must have told the truth.
We must have chosen the right path.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "वह जरूर वहाँ गई होगी।" = "She must have gone there."

questions.sentence: We must have _____ the right path.
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "We must have chosen the right path."
Correct sentence: "He must have studied hard."

options: He must have broken the promise.
She must have been very happy.
He must have talked to me.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "वे जरूर सफल हुए होंगे।" = "They must have succeeded."
Full sentence: "He must have talked to me."
Correct sentence: "She must have been sad."

questions.hindi: उन्होंने जरूर यह देख लिया होगा।
options: They must have made a mistake.
He must have thought a lot.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "उन्होंने जरूर यह देख लिया होगा।" = "They must have seen this."
Full sentence: "He must have thought a lot."
Correct sentence: "She must have reached home."

options: He must have read this book.
He must have broken the promise.
We must have done it right.
questions.answer: We must have done it right.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "हमने जरूर सही किया होगा।" = "We must have done it right."
Full sentence: "He must have broken the promise."
